title: Absolute Aromas Noel Festive Essential Oil with Cinnamon, Clove, Frankincense, Orange, Myrrh and Pine Oil - Great for diffusing at Christmas (10ml)
features: 100% NATURAL - Pure and undiluted premium quality blend of essential oils for Christmas. Vegan, GMO-free, cruelty-free, sustainably sourced ingredients.
AROMATHERAPY – A cheerful, all-natural festive essential oil blend containing notes of Orange, Clove, Pine, Frankincense and Cinnamon.

CHRISTMAS SPIRIT – Blended by skilled aromatherapists to help you get into the Christmas spirit; Refresh festive pine cones by sprinkling 6 to 7 drops of the Noel Blend for an atmosphere of warmth and Christmas cheer.

BLENDED FOR YOUR CONVENIENCE - Noel is part of our Essential Oils Blend range. These ready-to-use blends have been carefully formulated in-house by our team of experts and designed to assist, support and offer relief from all of life's eventualities.
AUTHENTIC - Members of the Aromatherapy Trade Council - Ethically sourced, authentic and quality assured aromatherapy oils for 25 years.
description: Product Description Absolute Aromas selects only the finest quality essential oils available from around the world and all of the oils used in this blend are no exception. Noel is a cheery festive diffusing blend that creates a perfect seasonal atmosphere in the home, with the traditional scents of Pine, Orange, Cinnamon, Frankincense and Myrrh. Each of these oils complement and uplift each other to create this versatile, balanced and ready-to-use festive essential oil blend. The oils in this blend are: Orange, Cinnamon, Clove, Pine, Myrrh and Frankincense. This blend is also a warming scent to diffuse all year round and is also available in a handy room spray for your convenience. Ingredients Contains 100% pure, natural and undiluted Cinnamon, Clove, Orange, Frankincense and Pine essential oils Directions Add up to 6 drops an essential oil diffuser bring a touch of cheer and joy the festive season. Alternatively, refresh potpourri by sprinkling 7 Noel Blend for atmosphere warmth Christmas cheer. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Avoid contact with eyes and skin. Do not ingest. Use only in a diffuser or potpourri. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Box Contains Contains 1 x 10ml bottle of Noel - A cheery, festive blend See more
